items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the scenario where the persona views corporate vs local reporting split. However, there is no concrete evidence or endpoints provided that demonstrate how this scenario is executed or what the expected outcomes are. The lack of specific details regarding the reporting mechanisms or the results of the scenario leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of the expected result.
